programmes.show_description: The latest five minute news bulletin from BBC World Service.
Ros Atkins is in Washington DC speaking to some of the most influential voices in American journalism. Who's shaping US media?
The latest two minute news summary from BBC World Service.

We speak to an OnlyFans "chatter", who sends explicit messages on behalf of models. Also: how AI helps scientists, and the White House's use of video games in its posts on war.

Artist Murray Siple was always drawn to outsiders breaking rules. The men racing shopping carts were no different. His personal challenges were his passport into this new world.
